cms.title: Struxa 1.0.56
cms.summary: Storefront search (opt-in): admins pick which publicly routed content types are searchable in Admin → Site → Search; queries at /search are sanitized, length-capped, rate-limited and use prepared, wildcard-escaped LIKE against published entries only. Also: external-link click tracking with a storefront beacon and Admin → Site → External links report (top destinations, top source pages, recent clicks, retention controls).
